content.text: {"title":"AI Support Playbook","items":[{"title":"Current Friction","outline":"Summarize the delays, inconsistent answers, and visibility gaps that make support operations difficult to scale."},{"title":"User Needs","outline":"Define the needs of customers, frontline agents, and operations leaders so the solution is anchored in real workflows."},{"title":"AI Assistance Model","outline":"Explain how intent detection, knowledge retrieval, case summarization, and quality review work together in the support process."},{"title":"Rollout Plan","outline":"Describe a phased implementation from data preparation to pilot, measurement, and broader deployment."},{"title":"Success Metrics","outline":"List the operational and customer experience metrics used to evaluate response speed, resolution quality, and satisfaction."}]}
